title: Phase 20: PSM 0x0010 IDA-confirmed RAD class identity + sub-kind discriminator
objective: Reverse-engineer the real RAD class behind PSM 0x0010 using IDA, identify the sub-kind discriminator offset + data type, enumerate sub-kind values, and produce an authoritative analysis doc mirroring Phase 16 jstyleoverride-v3-fields.md. Pure reverse engineering + documentation — no src/ code changes, no test changes.
evidence: Created after Phase 19 (leading_word audit) shipped and was committed (6beb6f1). Phase 19 probe confirmed 0x0010 is polymorphic with partial sub-kind discriminator at +0..+1 (28% coverage); heterogeneous size buckets (31/70/13/16/43) require IDA evidence to identify the real discriminator strategy. User authorized continuation via MCP relay channel.

summary: 12 reachable IDA instances confirmed via list_instances. Primary entry: radsrvitem.dll (port 13346, 5374 functions, 4867 unnamed). Secondary candidates: J2DSrv.dll (13347), style.dll (13348, Phase 16 navigated), sppid.dll (13341), smartplantpid.exe (13342), sppidautomation.dll (13340), sppiddwgprocess.dll (13343), sppidautomation.exe (13344), llama.dll (13345), ipidobjectmanagerinf.dll (13339), sppidautomationwrap.dll (13338). core.dll (13337) is AVEVA E3D, likely unrelated to SmartPlant P&ID. No new instance load planned.

radsrvitem.dll: 32-bit, base 0x56440000, image 0x3ec000. 5374 functions, 346 named, 4867 unnamed. 1739 strings. Exports: GetServerItemTransceiver (0x56448040), GetServerItemVersion (0x564480d0). DllEntryPoint at 0x564439e7. Segments: .text 0x56441000-0x5665e000 (0x21d000), .rdata 0x5665e578-0x5667b000, .data 0x5667b000-0x5681e000. Next: search_text for literal 0x10/0x0010/PSM dispatch pattern in .text.

Goal package drafted (brief/plan/verification/blockers/goal-prompt + 4 progress entries). Awaiting user authorization for /goal execution. Phase 20 estimated workload: 2-5 sessions (Phase 16 single type code reverse took multiple sessions; 0x0010 polymorphic family is larger scope). Recommended Slice A first action: search_text in radsrvitem.dll for PSM dispatch table referencing 0x10. Not commencing Slice A in this session per Stop-And-Ask scope (multi-hour IDA dive needs explicit /goal authorization).
